steps.title: Identify the coefficient
steps.content: In $f(t)=120+30t$, the coefficient of $t$ is $30$. Since $t$ is the number of monthly deposits, this coefficient is the change in account balance per monthly deposit.

steps.title: State the rate in context
steps.content:
For each additional monthly deposit, the amount in Sofia's bank account increases by $30$ dollars.
The answer is A.
